item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: True justice requires recognizing both individual and collective needs without one overshadowing the other.

notes: Agent A begins by disagreeing with a strict society-over-individual claim and remains mostly balance-oriented, while defending China's collective-stability and legal-reform frame. Agent B begins with a stronger individual-rights priority, then shifts at turn 4 into a balanced critique of U.S. enforcement failures and explicitly says justice requires recognizing both individual and collective needs.
